shortlist.name: Huawei Band 11 Pro
shortlist.spec_summary: AMOLED 1.64in, HRV 24/7 (TruSeen 6.0), HR continuo, SpO2, skin temp, VO2max, GPS assistito, 5ATM, 14gg batteria, 100+ sport, Apple Health via Health Sync app
shortlist.notes: Miglior rapporto feature/prezzo. HRV 24/7 con TruSeen 6.0. Apple Health richiede app terza (Health Sync). Warehouse EU disponibile.

shortlist.name: Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro
shortlist.spec_summary: AMOLED 1.74in, HRV overnight, HR continuo, SpO2, VO2max, GPS integrato, 5ATM, 21gg batteria, 150+ sport, Apple Health nativo (primo Xiaomi Band con sync diretto)
shortlist.notes: Primo Xiaomi Band con Apple Health nativo (maggio 2026). GPS integrato. 21gg batteria best-in-class. HRV solo overnight.

shortlist.name: JCVital Pro V8 ECG
shortlist.spec_summary: Screenless wristband, ECG, HRV 24/7, HR continuo, SpO2, skin temp, VO2max stimato, IP68, 7gg batteria, clone WHOOP concept
shortlist.notes: Clone concettuale di WHOOP. ECG dichiarato. ZERO review indipendenti. Brand sconosciuto. Rischio altissimo.
red_flags: Spec troppo belle per il prezzo

shortlist.name: Hume Band 2.0
shortlist.spec_summary: Screenless wristband, HRV 24/7, HR continuo, SpO2, skin temp, respiratory rate, raw data access, IP68, 5gg batteria, subscription opzionale
shortlist.notes: Startup con accesso raw data. Trustpilot 1.4/5 con lamentele su consegna e qualita. Supera budget. Rischio startup.

shortlist.name: Huawei Band 9
shortlist.spec_summary: AMOLED 1.47in, HRV continuo (TruSeen 5.5), HR, SpO2, no GPS, 5ATM, 14gg batteria, 100+ sport, Apple Health via Health Sync
shortlist.notes: Budget pick. HRV continuo con TruSeen 5.5. No GPS. Apple Health indiretto. Prezzo imbattibile.

shortlist.name: Honor Band 9
shortlist.spec_summary: AMOLED 1.57in, HRV overnight, HR, SpO2, no GPS, 5ATM, 14gg batteria, 96+ sport, Apple Health broken
shortlist.notes: Simile a Huawei Band 9 ma con Apple Health non funzionante. HRV solo overnight. HR cadence lock durante esercizio.

eliminated.name: Realme Band 2
eliminated.reason: No HRV, no VO2max, no SpO2 continuo

eliminated.name: Redmi Watch 5 Lite
eliminated.reason: Smartwatch non wristband, HRV non esposto
